mapper.sql: CASE q.status WHEN 1 THEN 'WAITING' WHEN 2 THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN 3 THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN 4 THEN 'FAILED' ELSE NULL END
CASE s.status WHEN 1 THEN 'IMAGE_RECEIVED' WHEN 2 THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE NULL END

WHERE s.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND s.is_active = 1
AND ( p.first_name ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR p.last_name ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(p.last_name, ''))) ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR p.patient_uid ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(s.study_description, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(s.accession_number, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(s.modality, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pacs_worklist_study_links search_qsl INNER JOIN pacs_worklists search_q ON search_q.id = search_qsl.worklist_id AND search_q.hospital_id = search_qsl.hospital_id WHERE search_qsl.hospital_id = s.hospital_id AND search_qsl.study_id = s.id AND search_qsl.is_primary = 1 AND COALESCE(search_q.visit_code, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' ) )
AND TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(p.last_name, ''))) ILIKE '%' || #{filter.patientName} || '%'
AND p.patient_uid ILIKE '%' || #{filter.mrn} || '%'
AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pacs_worklist_study_links modality_qsl INNER JOIN pacs_worklists modality_q ON modality_q.id = modality_qsl.worklist_id AND modality_q.hospital_id = modality_qsl.hospital_id WHERE modality_qsl.hospital_id = s.hospital_id AND modality_qsl.study_id = s.id AND modality_qsl.is_primary = 1 AND modality_q.modality_id = #{filter.modalityId} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM modalities modality_filter WHERE modality_filter.id = #{filter.modalityId} AND modality_filter.is_active = 1 AND ( UPPER(COALESCE(s.modality, '')) = UPPER(COALESCE(modality_filter.abbr, '')) OR UPPER(COALESCE(s.modality, '')) = UPPER(COALESCE(modality_filter.name, '')) ) ) )
AND COALESCE(s.accession_number, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.accessionNumber} || '%'
AND LOWER(s.accession_number) = LOWER(#{filter.accessionNumberExact})
AND COALESCE(s.study_date, CAST(s.received_at AS DATE), CAST(s.created AS DATE)) >= CAST(#{filter.startDate} AS DATE)
AND COALESCE(s.study_date, CAST(s.received_at AS DATE), CAST(s.created AS DATE)) <= CAST(#{filter.endDate} AS DATE)
AND s.status = #{filter.statusCode}
mapper.select: INSERT INTO pacs_studies ( hospital_id, patient_id, study_instance_uid, accession_number, modality, study_date, study_description, dicom_server_id, status, dicom_server_study_id, dicom_server_patient_id, dicom_server_series_id, received_at, is_active, created, modified ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{patientId}, #{studyInstanceUid}, #{accessionNumber}, #{modality}, #{studyDate}, #{studyDescription}, #{dicomServerId}, #{statusCode}, #{dicomServerStudyId}, #{dicomServerPatientId}, #{dicomServerSeriesId}, COALESCE(CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), 1, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (hospital_id, study_instance_uid) DO UPDATE SET accession_number = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.accession_number, pacs_studies.accession_number), modality = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.modality, pacs_studies.modality), study_date = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.study_date, pacs_studies.study_date), study_description = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.study_description, pacs_studies.study_description), dicom_server_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.dicom_server_id, pacs_studies.dicom_server_id), status = CASE WHEN pacs_studies.status = 2 THEN pacs_studies.status ELSE EXCLUDED.status END, dicom_server_study_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.dicom_server_study_id, pacs_studies.dicom_server_study_id), dicom_server_patient_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.dicom_server_patient_id, pacs_studies.dicom_server_patient_id), dicom_server_series_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.dicom_server_series_id, pacs_studies.dicom_server_series_id), received_at = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.received_at, pacs_studies.received_at), modified = NOW() RETURNING id

INSERT INTO pacs_studies ( hospital_id, patient_id, study_instance_uid, accession_number, reference_visit_code, modality, study_date, study_description, dicom_server_id, status, dicom_server_study_id, dicom_server_patient_id, dicom_server_series_id, source_type, uploaded_by, received_at, image_received_at, is_active, created, modified ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{patientId}, #{studyInstanceUid}, #{accessionNumber}, #{referenceVisitCode}, #{modality}, #{studyDate}, #{studyDescription}, #{dicomServerId}, #{statusCode}, #{dicomServerStudyId}, #{dicomServerPatientId}, #{dicomServerSeriesId}, 'UPLOAD', #{uploadedBy}, COALESCE(CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), COALESCE(CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), 1, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (hospital_id, study_instance_uid) DO UPDATE SET patient_id = EXCLUDED.patient_id, accession_number = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.accession_number, pacs_studies.accession_number), reference_visit_code = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.reference_visit_code, pacs_studies.reference_visit_code), modality = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.modality, pacs_studies.modality), study_date = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.study_date, pacs_studies.study_date), study_description = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.study_description, pacs_studies.study_description), dicom_server_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.dicom_server_id, pacs_studies.dicom_server_id), status = CASE WHEN pacs_studies.status = 2 THEN pacs_studies.status ELSE EXCLUDED.status END, dicom_server_study_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.dicom_server_study_id, pacs_studies.dicom_server_study_id), dicom_server_patient_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.dicom_server_patient_id, pacs_studies.dicom_server_patient_id), dicom_server_series_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.dicom_server_series_id, pacs_studies.dicom_server_series_id), source_type = COALESCE(pacs_studies.source_type, EXCLUDED.source_type), uploaded_by = COALESCE(pacs_studies.uploaded_by, EXCLUDED.uploaded_by), received_at = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.received_at, pacs_studies.received_at), image_received_at = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.image_received_at, pacs_studies.image_received_at), modified = NOW() RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE pacs_studies s SET status = #{statusCode}, modified = NOW() FROM pacs_worklist_study_links qsl WHERE qsl.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND qsl.worklist_id = #{worklistId} AND qsl.study_id = s.id AND qsl.is_primary = 1 AND s.hospital_id = qsl.hospital_id AND s.is_active = 1
mapper.sql: s.id, s.public_id::text AS publicKey, s.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, s.patient_id AS patientId, NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(p.last_name, ''))), '') AS patientName, p.patient_uid AS mrn, s.study_instance_uid AS studyInstanceUid, s.accession_number AS accessionNumber, s.reference_visit_code AS referenceVisitCode, s.modality, s.study_date AS studyDate, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(s.study_date::timestamp, s.received_at, s.created), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH12:MI AM') AS studyDateTime, s.study_description AS studyDescription, s.study_description AS description, s.dicom_server_id AS dicomServerId, AS status, NULL::INTEGER AS instances, s.dicom_server_study_id AS dicomServerStudyId, s.dicom_server_patient_id AS dicomServerPatientId, s.dicom_server_series_id AS dicomServerSeriesId, NULL::TEXT AS viewerUrl, q.id AS worklistId, q.public_id::text AS worklistPublicKey, q.visit_code AS worklistVisitCode, AS worklistStatus, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(s.image_received_at, s.received_at, q.image_received_at, q.received_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS imageReceivedAt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM pacs_studies s INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = s.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = s.patient_id AND p.hospital_id = s.hospital_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT linked_q.* FROM pacs_worklist_study_links linked_qsl INNER JOIN pacs_worklists linked_q ON linked_q.id = linked_qsl.worklist_id AND linked_q.hospital_id = linked_qsl.hospital_id WHERE linked_qsl.hospital_id = s.hospital_id AND linked_qsl.study_id = s.id AND linked_qsl.is_primary = 1 ORDER BY linked_qsl.linked_at DESC, linked_qsl.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) q ON TRUE
ORDER BY COALESCE(s.study_date, CAST(s.received_at AS DATE), CAST(s.created AS DATE)) DESC, s.id DESC
LIMIT #{filter.rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{filter.page}
LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pacs_studies s INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = s.patient_id AND p.hospital_id = s.hospital_id

SELECT
FROM pacs_studies s INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = s.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = s.patient_id AND p.hospital_id = s.hospital_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT linked_q.* FROM pacs_worklist_study_links linked_qsl INNER JOIN pacs_worklists linked_q ON linked_q.id = linked_qsl.worklist_id AND linked_q.hospital_id = linked_qsl.hospital_id WHERE linked_qsl.hospital_id = s.hospital_id AND linked_qsl.study_id = s.id AND linked_qsl.is_primary = 1 ORDER BY linked_qsl.linked_at DESC, linked_qsl.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) q ON TRUE WHERE s.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND s.id = #{id} AND s.is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
